title: Environment Agency waterways: boat registration renewal for existing Direct Debit customers
body: "Use this form to renew a boat registration on Environment Agency waterways.   You must be an existing Direct Debit customer to use this form.   This form should only be used by the current registered owner of a boat.   When you have renewed the registration, the Environment Agency will send you a registration plate to display on your boat.   Before you start   You need to know:    the boat name and registration number  your boat insurance policy provider, number and expiry date  your boat safety scheme certification number and expiry date, only if your previous one has expired    If you are renewing a business registration, you will need to know your public liability insurance:    provider   number    expiry date    Certain businesses may also need to know if your boat and operation meet the:    Code of Practice for Hire Boats  Merchant Shipping Regulations 2015  Inland Waters Small Passenger Boat Code    Start now   Get help   For help, contact the boat registration team by:    email at boatreg@environment-agency.gov.uk  calling us on 03708 506 506 Monday to Friday, 8am to 6pm  "
